---
title: "main"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
library(readr)
library(quantreg)
library(ggplot2)
```


```{r}
ggplot(data=data, mapping=aes(x=age))+
        geom_boxplot()
```


```{r}
ggplot(data=data, mapping=aes(x=sex))+
        geom_bar()
```

```{r}
ggplot(data = data, aes(x = bmi)) +
  geom_histogram()
```


```{r}
ggplot(data=data, mapping=aes(x=sex))+
        geom_bar()
```

```{r}
ggplot(data=data, mapping=aes(x=children))+
        geom_bar()
```

```{r}
ggplot(data=data, mapping=aes(x=smoker))+
        geom_bar()
```

```{r}
ggplot(data=data, mapping=aes(x=region))+
        geom_bar()
```

```{r}
data <- read_csv("insurance.csv")
```

```{r}
data
```


```{r}
model <- rq(charges ~ ., data=data, tau = 0.75)
```

```{r}
summary(model)
```
